description: Detects mutation of function parameters in JavaScript. NOTE: high false positive rate -- fires on any member property assignment inside a function body, including locally-constructed objects (e.g. const filter = {}; filter.role = role). A proper fix requires scope analysis (lhs_is_parameter primitive) planned as a follow-up. Manual triage required.

flag.message: Member expression assignment -- manually verify the object is a function parameter, not a local variable (false positives likely)
